Pages.Title: Rootbound Nexus
Pages.Text:
Rootbound Nexus is a powerful altar that can be used to perform rootbound rituals and create many useful items.

For a functional setup, the Nexus must be surrounded by pedestals and essence jars placed within a 16-block radius.

Once the right items are placed and enough essence is provided, a ritual can be started by using a rootbound wand on the Nexus.
